zh.lifeSummary: 當Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail於1060年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林時，她的父親King Niall Tir-Conall2歲，母親Unknown-3歲。她和Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan至少有7個兒子。她去世於大約1118年在愛爾蘭享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail于1060年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林时，她的父亲King Niall Tir-Conall2岁，母亲Unknown-3岁。她和Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan至少有7个儿子。她去世于大约1118年在爱尔兰享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ní
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Pei-Lin, Kong, Min, Ming, Yung, Bin, Cao, Huang, Jing, Wen, Zhen, Biao, Chang, Chi, Quan, Yaping.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 倪, meaning ‘boundary’ or ‘infants’ in ancient Chinese: adopted in order to escape from a feud in place of the Chinese surname 郳, which is also pronounced Ni. The original surname was from Ni (郳), the name of an ancient state, also called Little Zhu (located in Shandong province), granted to the son of Duke Wu of Zhu (ruler of the state of Zhu, died 796  BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 賴, see   Lai   1.

variants.name: Lai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ching, Kwok, Ming, Wing, Wai, Wen, Chi, Chun, Ho, Kam, Man, Yee.  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Tuan, Hoa, Ky, Lan, Thang, Tien, Trang, Tu, Yen, Anh.

Chinese: Mandarin or Cantonese form of the surname 賴, meaning ‘depend on’ in Chinese: from Lai (賴), the name of a state (located in Henan province), which was annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 來, meaning ‘to come’ in Chinese: (i) simplified form of the placename Lai (郲), the name of a fief (located in Henan province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) adopted in place of the Chinese surname Lai (萊) which originated from the name of a fief/state. After its annihilation by the state of Qi, people simplified the name as 萊 in order to escape from political persecutions.

variants.name: Ny
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or soldier's name from ny ‘new’. It may sometimes derive from a placename beginning with Ny-.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 倪 (see   Ni  ) or 聶 (see   Nie   2).

nameMeanings.name: Domail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanized form of Sorbian Domań or Doman (see Domann ).
French: from Old French domainier ‘feudal lord’, hence perhaps a nickname for someone who behaved in a lordly manner.

variants.name: Domann
meanings: Germanized form of Sorbian Domań or Doman: from a derivative of an Old Sorbian personal name, such as Domasław, based on the Old Slavic element domъ ‘home’, and probably also of its cognate Domaš (see Thomas 4), associated with the Biblical name Thomas. Compare Domain .
North German: from a Low German pet form of the personal name   Thomas  .

nameMeanings.name: Sadb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Sadd  .
In some cases possibly also French (also Sadé): nickname from Old French sade ‘gracious, gentle’ (from Latin sapidus ‘savoury’).

variants.name: Sadd
meanings: ‘Good luck, fortune’.  Sa‘d ibn-Abi-Waqqāṣ  was a cousin of the Prophet, who led the Muslims to victory in the Battle of Qadisiyya (  637 ). In  639  he founded Kufa, the holy city of Shiites.

nameMeanings.name: Ingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Ingegerd   and   Ingrid  , attested from the 16th-century.

nameMeanings.name: Mael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Fanciful spelling of Gail , also occasionally written Gaelle .

variants.name: Gail
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

nameMeanings.name: Morda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Muirne, originally a byname meaning ‘beloved’; borne by Fingal's mother in the Ossianic poems of James Macpherson ( compare Malvina ).

variants.name: Myrna
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Muirne , now also used elsewhere in the English-speaking world. It is associated with the American film star  Myrna Loy  (  1905–93 ).

variants.name: Muirne
meanings: Traditional name, originally a byname meaning ‘beloved’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail was born in 1060, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland, her father, King Niall Tir-Conall, was 2 and her mother, Unknown, was -3. She had at least 7 sons with Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan. She died about 1118, in Ireland, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail est née en 1060, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande, son père, King Niall Tir-Conall, avait 2 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait -3 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils avec Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan. Elle est décédée environ 1118, à Irlande, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail 1060 in Diocese of Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Niall Tir-Conall 2 und ihre Mutter Unknown -3. Sie hatte mit Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb um 1118 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail è nata il nel 1060 nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, sua padre, King Niall Tir-Conall, aveva 2 anni e sua madre, Unknown, aveva -3 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli con Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan. Morì circa 1118, nel Irlanda, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domailが1060年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンで生まれた時，父King Niall Tir-Conallは2歳，母Unknownは-3歳であった。彼女はGilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuanとの間に少なくとも7人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1118年にアイルランドで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail(이)가 1060년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Niall Tir-Conall(은)는 2세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 -3세였다. 그녀는 Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1118년 아일랜드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail nasceu em 1060, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, King Niall Tir-Conall, tinha 2 anos e sua mãe, Unknown, tinha -3 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos com Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1118, em Irlanda, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail родилась в 1060 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия, её отцу по имени King Niall Tir-Conall было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Unknown, -3. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей от Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan. Она умерла около 1118 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail nació en 1060, en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, King Niall Tir-Conall, tenía 2 años y su mamá, Unknown, tenía -3 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos con Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan. Murió aproximadamente 1118, en Irlanda, a la edad de 59 años.
